name: codebase-intelligence
description: Standalone PRP workflow (prp-plan / prp-implement / prp-loop) with Serena LSP structural codebase search, cross-session task memory keyed by Jira ticket + branch, live Jira ticket context injection, a personal KB (bookrag), and prp-loop: a bounded closed-loop runner with contract-mandated stop rules and an independent verifier. Self-contained — no prp-core required.
